channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: AI is no longer optional. clients demand how, not if, you use it. 🧠⚖️ https://Blockchain.News/news/legal-industry-ai-adoption-mandatory-client-pressure #AIinLaw #LegalTech #LawFirmTech
